code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        mut c = b
        if (b >= 65 and b <= 90) or (b >= 97 and b <= 122)
          c = b - 32
          if b >= 97
            c = b - 32
          else
            c = b + 32
          end
        end
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
